title: requests — health probes
description: Health probes registered with Foundation's health aggregator. Because this module has no local tables, health mostly asserts the BRIDGE is intact — workflow/approvals + access/grants are reachable, listeners are wired, the registry is populated.

probes.name: access-requests-registry-populated
probes.description: Verifies AccessRequestableRegistry has at least one entry — confirms boot-time discovery ran and consumer modules successfully declared their requestable models. Non-critical because a fresh install (before any consumer modules land) will legitimately have zero entries.

probes.name: access-requests-approvable-action-registered
probes.description: Verifies `workflow/approvals::approvable_actions` contains a row with key='access.grants.create'. Without it the submit action would bypass the approval middleware and no approval_instance would be created. Fires on every deploy — the approvable-action registration is a boot-time side effect of THIS module's ServiceProvider.

probes.name: access-requests-shim-listeners-registered
probes.description: Verifies every shim listener (ShimApprovalRequestedListener, ShimApprovalGrantedListener, ShimApprovalExecutedListener, ShimApprovalRejectedListener, ShimApprovalExpiredListener, ShimApprovalCancelledListener) is registered on the workflow/approvals event bus. Without them the bridge is broken — requests would flow but no AccessRequest events would fire, no notifications, no grants.

probes.name: access-requests-grants-module-reachable
probes.description: Verifies `access/grants::GrantIssuer` binding resolves + the target table exists. Without it approvals would deadlock at materialisation.

probes.name: access-requests-orphaned-approvals-under-threshold
probes.description: Counts approval_instances where action_key='access.grants.create' AND status='approved' AND context_json.materialised_grant_id IS NULL. Any non-zero count in the last hour means AccessRequestGrantMaterializer has been failing — alerts on-call to run `access-requests:remediate-orphaned-approvals`. Threshold: 3.

probes.name: access-requests-schedule-registered
probes.description: Boot-time. Verifies the three scheduled entries (cleanup-orphaned, send-reminders, audit-report) registered on the scheduler.
